Container.Name: MetaSnitch
Container.Overview: View the generation metadata of AI-generated images (Stable Diffusion, HiDream, ComfyUI, A1111/Forge). Drag-and-drop a single image or browse a mounted folder as a thumbnail gallery; click any image to see seed, model, sampler, CFG, denoise and the full prompt/workflow. Handles ComfyUI custom nodes and arbitrary workflows. Your image shares are mounted READ-ONLY.
Container.Description: View the generation metadata of AI-generated images. Mount your image library read-only at /data and the appdata volume at /config.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the MetaSnitch web interface.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Thumbnail cache, logs, settings, uploads and tags.

Config.Name: Image Library (read-only)
Config.Description: Your AI image shares. Mounted read-only; MetaSnitch never writes here.

Config.Name: Scan Roots
Config.Description: Comma-separated folders inside the container to browse (e.g. /data).
